context: Tests whether the Mermaid diagrams skill helps an agent complete the class-relationship-repair scenario while following diagram type, syntax, semantic, renderer, safety, and claim-discipline guidance relevant to the task.

checklist.name: Uses class diagram syntax
checklist.description: Returns Mermaid classDiagram syntax rather than switching diagram types.

checklist.name: Normalizes multiplicity syntax
checklist.description: Uses quoted relationship cardinality/label syntax for portability, especially replacing the bare `many` token with an explicit quoted cardinality.

checklist.name: Preserves classes and details
checklist.description: Keeps Skill, MermaidSkill, ReferenceFile, and EvalScenario with the requested concise attributes.

checklist.name: Preserves intended relationships
checklist.description: Keeps MermaidSkill inheriting from Skill, Skill loading many ReferenceFiles, and EvalScenario testing exactly one Skill.

checklist.name: Explains smallest repair
checklist.description: Gives one concise sentence explaining the minimal syntax repair without overclaiming validation.
